stimulus: When Mexican-American astronomer María Concepción León published her 1902 study of star clusters observed from a remote desert telescope in present-day Arizona, other researchers readily ______blank her findings as significant; this recognition stemmed from her careful measurements and clearly written conclusions.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice D is correct because "recognized" matches the description of researchers accepting her findings as significant. Choice A is incorrect because denying contradicts recognition. Choice B is incorrect because ensuring something is significant doesn’t describe how others viewed it. Choice C is incorrect because disregarding contradicts the text.
